summary: Comprehensive testing of IdeaForge platform completed successfully. All requested features tested and working - user registration, login, dashboard, project creation, project detail page, and logout. The 'Script error' issue from iteration 2 has been resolved.
passed_tests: Backend health check - API returns 200 with healthy status
Backend root endpoint - Returns IdeaForge API info
User registration - Creates new user and returns JWT token
User registration - Correctly rejects duplicate email
User registration - Validates email format
User login - Authenticates valid credentials
User login - Rejects invalid password
User login - Rejects non-existent user
Auth /me endpoint - Returns current user with valid token
Auth /me endpoint - Rejects missing token
Auth /me endpoint - Rejects invalid token
Project creation - Creates project with AI agent swarm (9 agents)
Project retrieval - GET project by ID works
Project listing - GET all projects works
Project deletion - DELETE and verify 404
Project agents - GET agents returns all 9 agents
Frontend registration flow - Form fills, submits, redirects to dashboard
Frontend login flow - Form fills, submits, redirects to dashboard
Frontend logout - Clears auth and redirects to login
Frontend dashboard - Shows user name, stats, recent projects
Frontend new project wizard - 4-step form completion
Frontend project detail page - Shows project info, tabs navigation

test_credentials.note: Tests use dynamically generated emails like test{random}@example.com

seed_data_creation: No seed data required - tests create and clean up their own data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core authentication and project features are working. The 'Script error' reported in iteration 2 was related to localStorage corruption or unhandled JSON parsing - this has been fixed with improved error handling in AuthContext.jsx. Backend APIs all working. AI document generation endpoints work but take 10-45 seconds due to GPT-5.2 processing. Next testing agent can focus on: document generation UI, landing page builder, analysis features.
rca_of_the_issue: The 'Script error' issue from iteration 2 was caused by corrupted localStorage data leading to JSON parsing errors in AuthContext.jsx. The fix added try-catch blocks around localStorage operations and proper cleanup of corrupted data. The error handling in api.js was also improved to handle network errors gracefully. These fixes resolved the authentication state management issues.
